Reads an Agent Zero memory directory (or index.pkl file),
extracts memories via a safe Python unpickler, and uploads them
to the Ogham gateway in batches of 100.

Requires python3 in PATH.

Examples:
  ogham import-agent-zero /tmp/agent-zero-memory/default/
  ogham import-agent-zero /tmp/agent-zero-memory/default/index.pkl --dry-run
  ogham import-agent-zero ./memory --areas fragments,solutions

Usage:
  ogham import-agent-zero <path> [flags]

Flags:
      --areas string        Comma-separated areas to import (default: all)
      --dry-run             Show what would be imported without uploading
  -h, --help                help for import-agent-zero
      --include-knowledge   Include knowledge imports

Global Flags:
      --python          Alias for --sidecar
  -q, --quiet           Suppress stderr informational notices (sidecar fallback message)
      --sidecar         Route through the Python MCP sidecar for the full retrieval pipeline (intent detection, strided retrieval, query reformulation, graph augmentation). Default is the fast native Go path.
      --text            Human-readable output (default is JSON for LLM / script consumption)
  -v, --verbose count   Increase stderr log verbosity (-v = info, -vv = debug)
